CVE-2019-25355.title: gSOAP 2.8 contains a directory traversal vulnerability that allow ...
CVE-2019-25355.description: gSOAP 2.8 contains a directory traversal vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to access system files by manipulating HTTP path traversal techniques. Attackers can retrieve sensitive files like /etc/passwd by sending crafted GET requests with multiple '../' directory traversal sequences.

CVE-2020-13574.title: A denial-of-service vulnerability exists in the WS-Security plugi ...
CVE-2020-13574.description: A denial-of-service vulnerability exists in the WS-Security plugin functionality of Genivia gSOAP 2.8.107. A specially crafted SOAP request can lead to denial of service. An attacker can send an HTTP request to trigger this vulnerability.

CVE-2020-13575.title: A denial-of-service vulnerability exists in the WS-Addressing plu ...
CVE-2020-13575.description: A denial-of-service vulnerability exists in the WS-Addressing plugin functionality of Genivia gSOAP 2.8.107. A specially crafted SOAP request can lead to denial of service. An attacker can send an HTTP request to trigger this vulnerability.

CVE-2020-13576.title: A code execution vulnerability exists in the WS-Addressing plugin ...
CVE-2020-13576.description: A code execution vulnerability exists in the WS-Addressing plugin functionality of Genivia gSOAP 2.8.107. A specially crafted SOAP request can lead to remote code execution. An attacker can send an HTTP request to trigger this vulnerability.

CVE-2024-4227.title: In Genivia gSOAP with a specific configuration an unauthenticated ...
CVE-2024-4227.description: In Genivia gSOAP with a specific configuration an unauthenticated remote attacker can generate a high CPU load when forcing to parse an XML having duplicate ID attributes which can lead to a DoS.
